Call 251-223-0812 View Services
Build

Excavation, concrete, masonry, fences, and structures.

Maintain

Lawn care, drainage, irrigation, and property upkeep.

Remove

Land clearing, demolition, tree and stump removal.

Improve

Grading, hauling, painting, and property upgrades.

What We Do

Our Services

Site & Earthwork

Excavation & Grading

Site preparation, dirt work, grading, and property improvement.

Land Clearing

Clearing overgrowth, brush, debris, and unwanted property material.

Drainage Work

Property drainage improvements and water-management solutions.

Demolition & Removal

Demolition & Removal

Removal of unwanted structures, debris, and property obstructions.

Tree & Stump Removal

Tree cleanup, stump removal, and related property clearing.

Concrete, Masonry & Structures

Concrete & Flatwork

Concrete-related property improvements and outdoor flatwork.

Masonry & Brick Work

Brick, block, and masonry improvement services.

Fence Installation

Fence construction, replacement, and property-boundary improvements.

Sheds & Small Structures

Shed, outbuilding, and small property-structure work.

Outdoor Fireplaces

Outdoor fireplace and hardscape feature construction.

Maintenance & Finishing

Lawn & Property Maintenance

General outdoor maintenance to keep residential and commercial properties clean and functional.

Irrigation Services

Irrigation installation, repair, and related outdoor water systems.

Painting

Exterior and property-improvement painting services.

Hauling & Materials

Dirt, Gravel & Material Hauling

Delivery, removal, and hauling of dirt, gravel, rock, and materials.

Dump-Truck Services

Hauling and material movement for property and construction projects.

Who We Are

About H&M Services

H&M Services provides property maintenance, outdoor construction, land clearing, removal, and improvement services for residential and commercial property owners in Fairhope and surrounding areas.

Areas served: Fairhope, Alabama · Baldwin County, Alabama
